title: Browse UI: entity detail card with inline edit
userStory: As a brainbot user, I want an entity detail view where I can fix extraction mistakes so that the human can directly edit brain data.
acceptanceCriteria: - Entity name (inline-editable; rename calls rename_entity mutation)
- Attributes table (click to edit; save calls set_entity_attribute mutation)
- Outgoing edges list (each clickable to traverse; trash icon calls delete_edge)
- Linked episodes (chronological; click opens episode detail)
- 'Merge into another entity' action: modal with search-as-you-type, then calls merge_entities
- 'Delete entity' action: confirmation, then calls delete_entity (soft delete)
Mobile-first: merge modal especially must be usable on phone
Verify: rename, attribute edit, edge delete, and merge all succeed against a test entity and the page reflects each change immediately
